special_mechanics.name: Weapon Pickups

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantitative movement physics data documented in available sources. Game is a run-and-gun action title with two-player simultaneous play. NES version received perfect 5-star rating for gameplay. Sources contain only design notes, level information, and regional differences—no technical physics parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Guerrilla War (NES)
